name: Merge Mosaics
author: Poki
description: Merge Mosaics is a merge game where you combine numerical mosaics to create bigger numbers! Connect three or more tiles with the same number to merge them into higher values. Strategically plan your moves and use exciting power-ups to keep the board clear and your numbers climbing. Can you reach the ultimate goal of one million? How to play Merge Mosaics? Click to select tiles and merge the identical ones. Who created Merge Mosaics? Merge Mosaics is created by Adgard. Play their other games on Poki: Pop It vs Spinner , Find The Candy , MadZOOng , Merge to Million , Mahjoctopus , Match Bee , and One Hundred Castles Solitaire , Freecell Solitaire ! How can I play Merge Mosaics for free? You can play Merge Mosaics for free on Poki. Can I play Merge Mosaics on mobile devices and desktop? Merge Mosaics can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
